title: How would you feel about an AI marketplace?
author: MrCashMooney
selftext:
A market place where users (regulars janes and joes) like ourselves can pair with an algorithm that fits our investment style. Automating the whole trading process instead of people with full-time jobs and responsibilities trying to learn, fail, and deem stock trading as a gambling method. Did you know over 4.6 billion dollars is traded by algorithms in the stock market, and 18 out of the 20 top hedge funds use algorithms to grow their client's account? But it's only accessible to the higher tax brackets.  


The reason I ask is that I partnered with several quant developers with proven algorithms in order to prove my concept and I wanna hear the community input.
